perQuestion.question: Paul di Resta was in the No. 853 race, what percent faster did he finish in the 853rd race than the next race for the fastest lap speed?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT results.fastestlapspeed
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN pitstops ON pitstops.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN results ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE results.raceid = 853
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestLapSpeed::numeric ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 854 THEN T2.fastestLapSpeed::numeric ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestLapSpeed::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

perQuestion.question: Among the drivers that finished the race in the 2008 Chinese Grand Prix, how many of them have participated in Formula_1 races?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT COUNT(drivers.driverid) AS driver_count
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND races.date >= '2008-01-01' AND races.date < '2009-01-01'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT T1.driverId FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.driverId HAVING COUNT(T2.raceId) > 0) AS subquery

perQuestion.question: How much faster in percentage is the champion than the driver who finished the race last in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT laptimes.driverid AS driverid, drivers.surname AS surname, AVG(laptimes.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time_ms
FROM constructorstandings
JOIN constructors ON constructorstandings.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN laptimes ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND races.date >= '2008-01-01' AND races.date < '2009-01-01'
GROUP BY laptimes.driverid, drivers.surname
ORDER BY average_lap_time_ms ASC
perQuestion.goldSql: WITH time_in_seconds AS (SELECT T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 3, 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 6) AS REAL) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 2) AS REAL) END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND NOT T1.time IS NULL AND T2.year = 2008), champion_time AS (SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1), last_driver_incremental AS (SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) FROM time_in_seconds)) SELECT (CAST((SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) AS REAL) * 100) / NULLIF((SELECT time_seconds + (SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) FROM champion_time), 0)

perQuestion.question: Please calculate the race completion percentage of Japanese drivers from 2007 to 2009.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT COUNT(laptimes.lap) AS lap_count, COUNT(races.raceid) AS race_count
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese' AND races.date >= '2007-01-01' AND races.date <= '2009-12-31'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT T1.time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(T1.raceId), 0) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T3.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

perQuestion.question: What is the average time in seconds of champion for each year, before year 1975?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT seasons.year AS year, AVG(laptimes.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time_ms
FROM laptimes
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN pitstops ON pitstops.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
WHERE seasons.year < 1975
GROUP BY seasons.year
ORDER BY seasons.year ASC
perQuestion.goldSql: WITH time_in_seconds AS (SELECT T2.year, T2.raceId, T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CASE WHEN SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 1) <> '' AND SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 2) <> '' AND SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 3), '.', 1) <> '' THEN (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 3), '.', 1) AS REAL) + CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(T1.time, ':', 3), '.', 2) AS REAL)/1000   ELSE 0 END) ELSE (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T1.time FROM 2) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(T1.time FROM 2) AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T1.time != ''), champion_time AS (SELECT year, raceId, time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1)  SELECT year, AVG(time_seconds) FROM champion_time WHERE year < 1975 GROUP BY year HAVING AVG(time_seconds) IS NOT NULL

perQuestion.question: What is the fastest lap number of the champion in 2009?
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T1.fastestLap FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'

perQuestion.question: What is the average of fastest lap speed in the 2009 Spanish Grand Prix race?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT AVG(CAST(results.fastestlapspeed AS numeric)) AS average_fastest_lap_speed
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN pitstops ON pitstops.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN results ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON results.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE races.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND races.date >= '2009-01-01' AND races.date <= '2009-12-31'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(T1.fastestLapSpeed AS NUMERIC)) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix'

perQuestion.question: From 2000 to 2005, what percentage of drivers who were born before 1985 and the lap numbers were over 50?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT DISTINCT drivers.driverid
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CAST(T3.dob AS TIMESTAMP), 'YYYY') < '1985' AND T1.laps > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T2.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005

perQuestion.question: How many French drivers who obtain the laptime less than 02:00.00?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT COUNT(drivers.driverid) AS french_drivers_count
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN results ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON results.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'French' AND results.fastestlaptime < '02:00.000'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.nationality = 'French' AND (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM T2.time::INTERVAL) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM T2.time::INTERVAL)) < 120

perQuestion.question: List out the code for drivers who have nationality in America.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT DISTINCT drivers.code
FROM qualifying
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'American'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT code FROM drivers WHERE Nationality = 'American'

perQuestion.question: State code numbers of top 3 yougest drivers. How many Netherlandic drivers among them?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.code, drivers.nationality
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN results ON results.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN drivers ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
ORDER BY drivers.driverid DESC
LIMIT 3
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT nationality FROM drivers ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 3) AS T3 WHERE nationality = 'Dutch'

perQuestion.question: Please state the reference name of the oldest German driver.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.driverref
FROM qualifying
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'German'
ORDER BY drivers.dob ASC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'German' ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: Which drivers who were born in 1971 and has the fastest lap time on the race? Give id and code of these drivers.

flags.detail: joinCount=1, rowCount=150, no GROUP BY/DISTINCT — possible join fan-out

perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T2.driverId, T2.code FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE TO_CHAR(CAST(T2.dob AS TIMESTAMP), 'YYYY') = '1971' AND NOT T1.fastestLapTime IS NULL

perQuestion.question: From race no. 50 to 100, how many finishers have been disqualified?
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT COUNT(races.raceid) AS num_finishers_disqualified
FROM races
WHERE races.raceid >= 50 AND races.raceid <= 100
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN NOT time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM results WHERE statusId = 2 AND raceID < 100 AND raceId > 50

perQuestion.question: How many times the circuits were held in Austria? Please give their location and coordinates.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT circuits.name AS name, circuits.location AS location, COUNT(races.raceid) AS race_count
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.country = 'Austria'
GROUP BY circuits.name, circuits.location
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT DISTINCT location, lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE country = 'Austria'

perQuestion.question: On what year did the youngest driver had his first qualifying race? Also state the name, date and time of the race.

flags.detail: explicit NULLS FIRST/LAST — verify NULL placement vs intended selection

perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT races.year, races.name, races.date, races.time
FROM qualifying
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN results ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE qualifying.qualifyid >= 23
ORDER BY drivers.dob DESC, races.date ASC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T3.year, T3.name, T3.date, T3.time FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers ORDER BY dob DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1) ORDER BY T3.date ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: List down top 3 German drivers who has the shortest average pit stop duration and were born between 1980-1985.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.driverref AS driverref, drivers.driverid AS driverid, AVG(pitstops.milliseconds) AS avg_pit_stop_duration_ms
FROM pitstops
JOIN drivers ON pitstops.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN results ON results.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON results.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'German'
GROUP BY drivers.driverref, drivers.driverid
ORDER BY avg_pit_stop_duration_ms ASC
LIMIT 3
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'German' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985 GROUP BY T2.forename, T2.surname ORDER BY AVG(CAST(T1.duration AS INTERVAL))  LIMIT 3

perQuestion.question: Who is the champion of the Canadian Grand Prix in 2008? Indicate his finish time.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT laptimes.driverid AS driverid, SUM(laptimes.milliseconds) AS total_time_ms
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY laptimes.driverid
ORDER BY total_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T1.time FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'

perQuestion.question: What is the constructor reference name of the champion in the 2009 Singapore Grand Prix? Please give its website.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT DISTINCT constructors.constructorref, constructors.url
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE races.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND races.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2009_Singapore_Grand_Prix'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T1.constructorId = T3.constructorId WHERE T2.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'

perQuestion.question: Which constructor scored most points from Monaco Grand Prix between 1980 and 2010? List the score, name and nationality of this team.
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT SUM(T1.points), T2.name, T2.nationality FROM constructorResults AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceid = T1.raceid WHERE T3.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T3.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T2.name, T2.nationality ORDER BY SUM(T1.points) DESC LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: What is full name of the racer who ranked 1st in the 3rd qualifying race held in the Marina Bay Street Circuit in 2008?

flags.detail: races.circuitid = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' → inSampleValues=unknown(no sampleValues)
name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' → inSampleValues=unknown(no sampleValues)

perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname
FROM qualifying
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE qualifying.position = 1 AND circuits.name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' AND races.round = 3 AND races.date >= '2008-01-01' AND races.date <= '2008-12-31'
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE q3 IS NOT NULL AND T3.year = 2008 AND T3.circuitId IN (SELECT circuitId FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit') ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT_PART(q3, ':', 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 + CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(q3, ':', 2), '.', 1) AS REAL) + CAST(SPLIT_PART(q3, '.', 2) AS REAL) / 1000 ASC LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: As of the present, what is the full name of the youngest racer? Indicate her nationality and the name of the race to which he/she first joined.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.nationality, races.name
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
ORDER BY drivers.dob DESC, races.date ASC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T3.name FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.dob notnull ORDER BY T1.dob DESC LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: How many accidents did the driver who had the highest number accidents in the Canadian Grand Prix have?

flags.detail: explicit NULLS FIRST/LAST — verify NULL placement vs intended selection

perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT laptimes.driverid AS driverid, COUNT(laptimes.driverid) AS accident_count
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN constructors ON qualifying.constructorid = constructors.constructorid
WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY laptimes.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN status AS T3 ON T1.statusId = T3.statusId WHERE T3.statusId = 3 AND T2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' GROUP BY T1.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(T1.driverId) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

perQuestion.question: Which top 20 driver created the shortest lap time ever record in a Formula_1 race? Please give them full names.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN pitstops ON pitstops.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE laptimes.position <= 20
ORDER BY laptimes.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1
perQuestion.goldSql: WITH lap_times_in_seconds AS (SELECT driverId, (CASE WHEN SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 1) AS float) * 60 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 2), '.', 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 2), '.', 1) AS float) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 2), '.', 2) <> '' THEN CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(time, ':', 2), '.', 2) AS float) / 1000 ELSE 0 END) AS time_in_seconds FROM lapTimes) SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, T1.driverId FROM (SELECT driverId, MIN(time_in_seconds) AS min_time_in_seconds FROM lap_times_in_seconds GROUP BY driverId) AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T1.min_time_in_seconds ASC LIMIT 20

perQuestion.question: Please list the lap records for the circuits in Italy.
perQuestion.predictedSql:
SELECT circuits.name AS name, MIN(laptimes.milliseconds) AS best_lap_time_ms
FROM laptimes
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY circuits.name
perQuestion.goldSql: WITH fastest_lap_times AS (SELECT T1.raceId, T1.FastestLapTime, (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, ':', 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, ':', 2), '.', 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, '.', 2) AS REAL) / 1000) AS time_in_seconds FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL) SELECT T1.FastestLapTime AS lap_record FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN (SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.time_in_seconds) AS min_time_in_seconds FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T3.country = 'Italy') AS T4 ON (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, ':', 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, ':', 2), '.', 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SPLIT_PART(T1.FastestLapTime, '.', 2) AS REAL) / 1000) = T4.min_time_in_seconds LIMIT 1
